strategy: He hides behind a -90% Tower Shield that he refreshes whenever damage removes it, so don't try to punch through it with raw hits.
Exploit his heal cheat: cast a Healing Spell and he strips his own Tower Shield (via Pierce), then hit him hard the very next round before he re-shields.
Alternatively Pierce, Shatter, or Steal Ward removes the Tower safely — he won't replace it until he's actually damaged.
Attack with Myth or Life (he takes +35% from both); never hit into his 80% Storm resist without a prism.
Stack blades, then land one clean single hit in the open window (avoid multi-hit spells that let him re-shield mid-attack).
cheatNotes: He opens with a -90% Tower Shield by interrupt — you can't meaningfully damage him through it.
He refreshes the Tower every time a hit breaks it, so remove it another way.
Pierce, Shatter, and Steal Ward remove the Tower safely — he won't re-shield until he's actually damaged.
Cast a Healing Spell and he strips his own Tower Shield — hit him the next round before he re-shields, the cleanest opening.
